property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17.0.2\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17.0.2\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\scripts;C;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.8.6\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files (x86)\GitExtensions\;C:\Program Files\pmd-bin-6.50.0\bin;C:\Users\jmusi\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\mingw-w64\x86_64-8.1.0-posix-seh-rt_v6-rev0\mingw64\bin;;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2022.2.3\bin;;.

testcase.name: testNullNameShouldPrintDefaultName

error.message: Unresolved compilation problems: The declared package "pt.trainings.maven.scratch" does not match the expected package "" Greetings cannot be resolved to a type Greetings cannot be resolved to a type Greetings cannot be resolved to a type Greetings cannot be resolved to a type
